title: Gemini Spark arrives on Mac as Google pushes desktop agents into local workflows
friendlyTitle: Google's Gemini Spark agent is now on Mac
summary: Google's Gemini Spark beta is now available in the Gemini desktop app for U.S. Google AI Ultra subscribers on macOS, with file tasks, app integrations, real-time tracking and custom MCP support.
friendlySummary: Gemini Spark can help with files and apps on a Mac, and Google says more cross-device tasks are coming.
whyItMatters: Desktop access makes agents more useful because they can work with local files and familiar apps. The product also signals that premium AI plans are increasingly tied to agents that act across devices, not just stronger chat models.
friendlyWhyItMatters: AI assistants become more useful when they can work inside the tools and files you already use every day.
